# Md Nishath Khandakar

> Full-Stack Developer & AI Builder. Full-stack websites, desktop & mobile apps, automation and SEO — delivered fast. 7+ years of experience, government-verified freelancer (Dept. of ICT, Bangladesh), building AI-powered with Claude Code. One developer, full team output.

Website: https://mdnishath.com
Contact: nishath.khandakar@gmail.com · WhatsApp +880 1797-691159
GitHub: https://github.com/mdnishath

## Services

- Web Development: MERN, Next.js & WordPress — any stack, pixel-perfect
- Desktop Apps: cross-platform desktop software with Electron
- Mobile Apps: native-feel Android & iOS applications
- UI/UX & Figma: clean, modern interfaces designed pixel-perfect
- SEO: on-page, technical SEO & indexing that ranks
- Automation: custom scripts & workflow automation
- Telegram Bots: smart Telegram bot development
- Google Business (GMB): setup, reviews & reputation management
- AI-Powered Development: shipping faster with Claude Code as co-builder
